runTitle: Vercel Playwright QA - AI fragile load-query closure on v8.11.129
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production deployment dpl_BkQYTY7ZkvN5fybyD9zCjr4HQY55 is Ready and aliased to https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app
/api/version reports v8.11.129, commit 4a8d5be20bbd1502f4d72ed54e0917a846b1e50a, and release pipeline 2517338884
Dashboard guest flow opened the AI sidebar with AI engine status Ready
Previously failing fragile whole-fleet load phrasing variants were tested through the real UI path without bypassing CSRF
Prompt with 서버명 intentionally omitted and 1분 load 제일 튄 시각 returned load1 24h peak timestamp 2026-05-12 03:50, peak 16.58, average 9.08, and top servers
Prompt with CPU excluded and 시스템 load/제일 버거웠던 때 returned load1 24h peak timestamp 2026-05-12 03:50 and culprit server db-mysql-dc1-primary 16.58
Browser console reported 0 warnings and 0 errors; API network calls returned 200/201
skippedSurfaces: Full five-question conversational AI QA was not repeated to avoid unnecessary live LLM cost; this run targeted the known vulnerable peak-load phrasing only
Core route pack beyond dashboard AI sidebar

plannerShadowObservations.surface: AI sidebar fragile load phrasing closure
plannerShadowObservations.source: Visible answers stayed grounded to load1/24h whole-fleet peak evidence for both previously failing natural Korean variants.

expertAssessments.rationale: The semantic parser/domain resolver fix kept both previously failing Korean load phrasings on load1, recent-24h, whole-fleet peak evidence and included numeric support plus a short operational interpretation.
The production deployment is Ready, /api/version matches v8.11.129, API paths returned HTTP 200/201, and Vercel usage remains within the no-billed-usage guardrail.
The run used a small risk-based Playwright MCP prompt set with durable screenshot, transcript, network, console, and resource-timing evidence instead of broad live LLM repetition.

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after v8.11.129 targeted fragile load-query closure QA; effective 6.7213 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 6090.

completedImprovements.title: AI Assistant natural load phrasing stays on load1/24h whole-fleet peak evidence after v8.11.129 semantic parser fix
completedImprovements.note: Closure for QA-20260512-0481: both previously failing prompts now return load1 peak timestamp 2026-05-12 03:50, peak 16.58, average 9.08, and top contributor db-mysql-dc1-primary without drifting to CPU/memory or recent-1h evidence.

notes: This release-facing targeted QA verifies the production v8.11.129 fix for the specific semantic metric/time-window drift found on v8.11.128.
The visible footer still says 일반 대화 응답, but answer content and evidence are correctly grounded to load1 peak data; treated as non-blocking presentation metadata for this closure.
Full conversational AI QA was intentionally not repeated to control live LLM cost; local deterministic contract tests already covered the parser/provider regression.
